title: Gooey Portuguese Toasted Nut Crumble with Lemongrass
description: A fresh and nostalgic twist on a traditional Portuguese dish featuring toasted bread, crunchy nuts, and the subtle sweetness of lemongrass stalks.

ingredients.name: Low-sodium soy sauce (for added depth of flavor)
Coarse sugar or brown sugar
ingredients.notes: For the gooey center and caramelization during baking

instructions: Toast the bread slices until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
While the bread is toasting, finely mince half a lemongrass stalk and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together the minced lemongrass, low-sodium soy sauce, and the coarse sugar or brown sugar. Set this mixture aside as well.
Once both slices of bread are toasted, spread the honey-sweetened lemongrass mixture evenly over one slice of toast.
Top with a layer of almonds for added crunch and a sprinkle of walnuts on top.
Bake in preheated oven for 8-10 minutes or until the sugar is lightly caramelized and the nuts are golden brown.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly before serving as an irresistible dessert-like treat.
